description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark hip roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a neatly manicured lawn with a paved driveway and parking area. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, large windows, and a double-door entryway. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, likely stucco or concrete, with darker trim and roof tiles. The house includes a balcony on the upper floor, visible from the side, and a garage or carport area adjacent to the main structure. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping is minimal, with geometric grass patches and paved walkways complementing the modern aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark hip roof, large windows, a covered porch, and a paved driveway on a manicured lawn. The exterior is light gray with dark trim and features a balcony and garage area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, large windows, and driveway with a parked car.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the balcony, garage/carport area, and the paved driveway extending to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area and symmetrical window arrangement, with less visible entry features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side windows, balcony, and the driveway with a car parked near the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with a covered porch, columns, and steps leading up from the driveway.
